socketedItems.secDescrText: Infuses your two-handed melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. Every fifth time you attack with this skill it fires more, high-damage projectiles.

flavourText: Zana watched in awe as her father spoke. With each word,
he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.
